_meta.description: Quest file untuk region netral Pax Nexus. File baru — tambahkan ke CDN sebagai 'quest_neutral.json'.
instructions: 1. Upload file ini ke repo echo-master-data sebagai quest_neutral.json
_meta.reward_rule: Semua quest Pax Nexus menggunakan CRD sebagai reward (bukan faction currency), karena ini zona netral. Khusus quest dari Ghost (shadow_contracts) bisa ada kombinasi CRD + item.

quests.title: The Weight of Peace
quests.description: Arbiter Lorn Kael has received intelligence of illegal weapon stockpiling near the border between two faction territories. A third party is believed to be arming both sides to provoke conflict. Investigate the weapons cache and report your findings to the Arbiter before a spark ignites a war.

objectives.description: Visit Arbiter Lorn Kael in the Conclave Hall to receive mission briefing
Neutralize {count} rogue arms dealers near the contested border
Recover {count} illegal weapon caches
Return evidence to Arbiter Lorn Kael

quests.title: Strings Above the Stars
quests.description: The weapons cache investigation pointed to a shadow organization manipulating multiple factions simultaneously. Commander Sera Holt requests a deep infiltration mission into a known smuggling hub. Gather intelligence on the organization's structure before they go underground.

objectives.description: Infiltrate the suspected smuggling hub in the conflict zone
Gather {count} intelligence fragments without alerting guards
Eliminate {count} shadow enforcers who spot you during extraction
Deliver intelligence to Commander Holt

quests.title: The Conclave's Verdict
quests.description: The intelligence gathered reveals an existential threat: a rogue Custodian officer is orchestrating the shadow organization, using faction conflict as cover for acquiring planet-killer weapon components. Ambassador Vael must be briefed, and the threat neutralized before the next Conclave session. This is a multi-stage raid-level operation.

objectives.description: Breach the rogue Custodian's hidden fortress
Destroy {count} planet-killer weapon component storage pods
Defeat the rogue Custodian Commander — a former Guardian-class Dreadnought captain
Return to Ambassador Vael with proof of neutralization

quests.title: A Merchant's Dilemma
quests.description: Elara Voss needs a shipment of medical supplies that was intercepted by faction skirmishes near a mid-tier zone. Retrieve the cargo before the supplies expire or are looted.

objectives.description: Travel to the skirmish zone where the supply convoy was ambushed
Recover {count} medical supply crates from the ambush site
Eliminate {count} opportunist looters protecting the site
Return the supplies to Elara Voss

quests.title: The Chronicler's Lost Page
quests.description: The Chronicler has detected a missing fragment of the Galactic Archive — a page describing an ancient faction conflict that was deliberately erased. Someone doesn't want this history known. Recover it from a deep-tier region before it's destroyed.

objectives.description: Reach the hidden archive vault in the deep-tier region
Scan {count} archive fragment readers to locate the lost page
Defeat {count} automatons guarding the vault
Retrieve the lost archive page
Return the page to The Chronicler

quests.title: Vulkan's Special Order
quests.description: Master Vulkan has been commissioned to forge a legendary weapon, but requires materials that can only be found in high-danger regions controlled by specific factions. Gather the materials — from any source.

objectives.description: Collect {count} Iron Hegemon Alloy Shards (from Iron Hegemony regions)
Collect {count} Arcane Crystal Cores (from Arcanum Seeker regions)
Collect {count} Starforged Stellar Ore (from Starforged Legion regions)
Deliver materials to Vulkan Dross

quests.title: Border Patrol
quests.description: The Custodians need independent operatives to patrol the border zones near Pax Nexus and report any unusual activity. This is routine work but crucial for maintaining the peace.

objectives.description: Eliminate {count} border raiders threatening the neutral zone
Return to report to Arbiter Lorn Kael

quests.title: Market Stabilization
quests.description: The AMA needs item material samples from various regions to calculate accurate resource production indices for exchange rate computation. Gather materials from different zone tiers.

quest_giver.name: NEXON AMA-7
quest_giver.location: Pax Nexus — The AMA Exchange Hub

objectives.description: Collect {count} material resource samples from any region (any item material counts)

quests.title: The Ghost's Errand
quests.description: Ghost needs a package delivered to a contact in a high-danger region. He assures you the contents are legal. He always says that. The contact will pay upon delivery — which means you'll need to handle anything that tries to stop you.

objectives.description: Reach the delivery point in the high-danger region
Eliminate {count} interceptors who ambush you during delivery
Complete the delivery with Ghost's contact

quests.title: Currency Smuggling Investigation
quests.description: The AMA has detected counterfeit CRD circulating in faction markets — a direct attack on the Credent's integrity. NEXON AMA-7 has pinpointed the likely source: a underground forging operation in the conflict zone. Destroy the counterfeit operation and recover samples for AMA forensic analysis.

quest_giver.name: NEXON AMA-7
quest_giver.location: Pax Nexus — The AMA Exchange Hub

objectives.description: Locate the underground counterfeit forge in the conflict zone
Destroy {count} counterfeit CRD press machines
Eliminate {count} forge guards protecting the operation
Recover {count} counterfeit CRD samples for forensic analysis
Submit samples to NEXON AMA-7 for analysis

quests.title: Stabilize the Market
quests.description: An economic crisis is brewing: one faction's currency has collapsed to dangerous lows, threatening galactic trade routes. The AMA is deploying an emergency stabilization package, but needs ground operatives to secure the delivery route and fend off speculators trying to exploit the collapse. This is a party mission.

quest_giver.name: NEXON AMA-7
quest_giver.location: Pax Nexus — The AMA Exchange Hub

objectives.description: Escort the AMA stabilization convoy to the crisis faction capital
Eliminate {count} speculator squads attacking the convoy
Deliver the stabilization package to the AMA terminal at the capital

quests._section: === FACTION + CRD DUAL REWARD EXAMPLES (Special Quests) ===

quests.title: Cross-Faction Trade Summit
quests.description: Ambassador Vael is organizing a trade summit between warring factions. Your job: secure the venue, escort delegates, and prevent assassination attempts. Success means a peace treaty — which the Custodians will reward generously. Your faction will also reward your diplomatic service.

objectives.description: Neutralize {count} summit disruptors before the delegates arrive
Escort Delegate A safely to the summit hall
Escort Delegate B safely to the summit hall
Defeat {count} elite assassins sent to disrupt the summit

rewards._reward_note: currency=400 dibayar dalam mata uang faction player. crd=600 dari Custodian. Dual reward.
